prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-CARRYALLBAG-BAG PARENT Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Rock Hounding Equipment Tools Metal Detector Bag, Treasure Hunter Accessories Description: Hit the great outdoors with the right gear and never miss an overturned treasure hiding in plain sight.

The ASR Outdoor carry-all bag was designed to hold all of your metal detecting gear and rock hounding equipment. It works remarkably well for a multitude of different activities and features a truely classic two-tone design in thick, ripstop nylon that is double stitched at all stress points to ensure that it will last through many years of beach combing with your metal detector in the sand or rock hopping up bolders looking for geodes; ease of use was a key concept in the design of this bag, simply by adjusting the shoulder strap you are able to pull the bag higher up on your hip which aids in making this an exceptionally useful treasure finds bag.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag has 13 different pockets that will easily house your rock hounding tools like a rock hammer, compact shovel, flashlight, collection vials and jars as well as compass, journal, even a mini-sluice box. These pockets are incorporated into the bag in a way that do not take away from the large, main compartment which is designed to hold your found treasures. There is also a built in pin point metal detector loop hold built into the side of the bag, for ease of access. The most notable feature may well be the unique large zippered flap that covers the entire length and width of the bag itself; unfurl it to access your specialty tools, notepad and maps without missing a beat on the your treasure hunt.

Gold prospecting, metal detecting and rockhounding are great outdoor activities that can be enjoyed by both adults and kids alike. If you're looking to get into these fun hobbies, ASR Outdoor has you covered with the right gear for your activity. Get out there and explore, and maybe you'll even strike it rich. Search Terms: metal detecting accessories tool bags rock hounding equipment for adults beginner rockhounding tools geology gifts pay dirt rocks gems tumbler supplies Features: - METAL DETECTOR TREASURE FINDS BAG: The carry-all bag is well suited for a multitude of hobby activities; designed to hold all of your metal detecting equipment, and rock hounding supplies, while providing ample storage for recovered raw material in the field - COMPARTMENTS AND POCKETS: Featuring a large, main compartment that acts as a raw materials collection area, there are 13 total expandable interior pockets to keep your tools organized; a side opening specialty tool flap that allows quick access and separation for notepads, diagrams and maps as well as a built-in pin pointer metal detector loop that is accessible on exterior side of the geology tool bag - QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Featuring double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of rockhounding and metal detecting beach combing trips. Made of high quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine - EASE OF ACCESS: 2 quick-release buckles allow you to access your rockhounding geology tools quickly in the main compartment; unzip the front facing second compartment to access your specialty tools while in the field. A top carry handle as well as an adjustable and removable shoulder strap for custom comfort will easily housing your metal detecting accessories - MUSETTE BAG SPECIFICATIONS: Material: weather resistant nylon; Strap type: shoulder; Top carry handle; Colors: two-tone green and brown; Pockets: 13; Quick-release buckles; Weight: 1.8lbs; Measurements: 16" x 15" x 5" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
